hooks.command: echo '💡 AgToosa: Remember to update Docs/Master-Plan.md and sync Linear before ending your session.'

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); exit(0 if "git commit" in d.get("command","") else 1)' 2>/dev/null; then echo '🔒 AgToosa gate: ensure all tests pass before committing.'; fi

python3 -c "import json,sys,os; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('file_path',''); n=len(open(f).readlines()) if f and os.path.exists(f) else 0; print(f'\u26a0\ufe0f  AgToosa: {f} has {n} lines (>500). Consider splitting.') if n>500 else None" 2>/dev/null || true
